TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pi-de-ta-di‚Äô, title = Pi-de-ta-di‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pi-de-ta-di‚Äô} }

S.FORM: == Pi-de-ta-di'ŚĹľŚĺóŚ§ßŚłĚ == Pi-de yese, sakakaay nu wawa ni A-lie-ke-sie. Mi-ha-yi-luo-wi-ci.Luo-man-nuo-hu atu Na-ta-li. Ci-li-e-luo-hu-na. Na-lie-se-cin-na, A-lie-ke-sie. Mi-ha-yi-luo-wi-ci.Luo-man-nuo-hu sakaenem nu wawaan tu tatami. . sakay binacadan a dadan Ť¶™śĒŅšĻčŤ∑Į caynem waltu mihcaan, ci Pi-de-ta-di a padek nu wina a kaka ci Aw-duo-e sanse mapatay, nai' ku iluc nida. Pi-de-ta-di' a duma nu padek a wina nu kakaan ci Yi-fan wse amica ku nika idaw a milaylay, nika ci Yi-fan wse la'cus ku udip nida, sisa ci Puo-ya-e-tu-ma pisinkiwan cacay a bataan ku mihcaan ni Pi-de-ta-di'. tawya nu mihcaan sepaday a bulad, nida a padek nu kakanaan ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa mibangbang tu mikuwangay a tademaw, tatusaay nida a baki ci Ci-li-e atu Yi-fun.Na-lei-se-cin i nuayawan nida a mipatay. 1682ŚĻī, . nikalawlawan satu, ci Yi-fan wse atu ci Pi-de-ta-di' mapulung malasa-hun, ci Yi-fan wse ku sakakaay, ci Suo-fei-ya malase-cen, tatengan cinida ku mikuwanay. kapulungan tu sananal masasakamu , ci Pi-de-ta-di atu ci Yi-fan wse mapulung mueneng i nuayawan, ci Pi-de-ta-di' atu binacadan masasakamu, ci Suo-fei-ya i nikudan mueneng. wan mueneng i Pi-de-ta-di' tepalan a nikudan tu mabuhatay nu panan, sipakayda i pananan, ci Suo-fei-ya taneng mitudu' ci Pi-de-ta-dian tu kawawan. . caynem walsiw mihcaan, mademec ni kalepacawan, ci Pi-de-ta-di milingatu mibelin ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa a nipikuwan. ci Suo-fie-ya kinacacay aca milawlaw tu misimaway a miwawies, nika ci ci Pi-de-ta-di salabisa milaliw taydan ci Sie-e-kay-san-sanyi siwtawyen, itida tu palcapu tu patidengan ci nidaan. sadikuday mabelin ci Suo-fie-ya pulul hantu i siwtawyen. 1689ŚĻī, caynem siwsip mihcaan , cina ni Pi-de-ta-di ci Na-ta-li. Ci-li-e-luo-hu-na. Na-lie-se-cin-na imelang mapatay, kya tatengaay tu nida sisikineng tina kawawan. caynem siwlim mihcaan, ci Pi-de-ta-di mangalay miyukiw tu Hei-hay a sakatahekal nu bayuan pasayda i Ke-li-mi-ya-han-kanatal milepacaw. . nida a lemed mutikuaca taluma' Ś§©ŚĎĹśĒłś≠ł caynem siwnem mihcaan, ci Sa-hun-yi wse iemlang mapatay, ci Pi-de sadikuday mala nidatu a Sa-hun. caynem siwpic mihcaan, manglay miwawies tu Ke'-li-mi-ya kanatal a sakakaay ci E'-tu-man-tikuo, pacebaan nida ku ngangan tacuwacuwa i Si-o midan, papatahekalen nida ku tabakiya a masakaputay, mangalay papacuwah ci nidaan, pangangan han tu Ta-cu-se. nika nu O-cuo tabakiay nu kanatalan itida namin ku balucu' nuheni i Si-pan-ya a nikaalasiasay nu nikaalawan tu wanwi, u Aw-ti-li a hidan tu ku nikalpacawan kaisa misanai' tu E'-tu-man a nikasasungaay. amica ku caay kanikalecabayan tu E'-tu-man, nika itida i He-lan cinida yadahtu ku nipinanam nida tu sapisanga tu balungan, maadih nida ku nikalekal nu kanatalan, namakayni sisa u sasumadan a papalekalan tu E'-luo-se. 1697ŚĻī, . caynem siwwal mihcaan tu lalud, mibelin ku labuay a hitay, mangalay paayaw tu padek a kakaan ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa palasahungan, ci Pi-de yise putun han nida ku nipidang kalahen nida taluma', nika ka talumaan nida idadan henay masasungaay tu ku nuheni, ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa pacicien patayda i siwyen malabunsan. lalabaen ni Pi-de yise ku mihantayay a tademaw, mihantayay a tademaw melecen ku nipipatay, tangah sipahelak i katuuday, bulasaken ku hitay. tawya a mihcaan, pacicien ni Pi-de yise ku hun-huo ci Yei-hu-duo-ci-ya. Luo-pu-si-na malabunsan. 1698ŚĻīŚ§ŹŚ§©, . dumaŚÖ∂šĽĖ ci Pi-de-ta-di manamuh miladay tu hitay malepacaw, sayaway nida a nikalepacawan makaci, namiladaytu tu hitay manamuh tu nikataluma', mahida u sakakaay nu hitay. hina seneng ci nida tu sakakaay a waywayan nida, kaygun sakakaay caay kaw Sa-hun dada'. . mangalay misaahebal tu bayu a cinlian, demecen nu heni ku satinengay a hitayan u Zua-din, cinida tu ku mikantukay tu nipisikian nu aydaay a Sen-pi-de-paw. . ci Pi-de-ta-di namisahucu nu tademawan katukuh i He-lan minanam misanga tu balunga a nalimaan. ci Pi-de-ta-di idaw ku la'cusay nida a waywayan. ku singalih tu tatamaan a wawa ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci midayday tu kawaw nida, milecad ci nidaan hinalepacaw a tademaw, nika ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci kaisa u hucu nu tademaw kuhan, sa tayda i Aw-ti-li micudad, mangalay milaliw tu E'-kuo, pacebaan sisa taluma' satu, ci Pi-de-ta-di pasacacayen nida ku wawa, u cancanan a waywayan ku sapipatay tu cabay nu wawa nida, u sapakadateng patalaw tu wawa nida. nika ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci i katuuday nu tademawan mihapu tu sakala'cus tu E'-kuo tu sapikuwan a sasakamuen. matawid ci Pi-de-ta-di mangalay mibakin ci nidaan. nika nakamuan nida anutaluma' ku wawa nida amalahucunu tademaw sa, ahican tu kiya haw patayda hantu nida i cuciw, yihua, sakakaay atu duma nu masakaputay misaybang, hinisa ku nuheni u kawaw nu luma' namu kuyni han. . caypic caywal mihcaan enem bulad tunem demiad, pihapuan tu nikuda a tusa nu demiadan malawacu tu ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci nikatulinan a mutiik, patay satu i Sen-pi-de-paw a Pi-de-paw-luo a kitidaan, tawya nu mihcaan tuwal ku mihcaan nida. 1718ŚĻī6śúą26śó•, .
S.PHON: == pi-d…ô-ta-di Ē~ °**** == pi-d…ô j…ôs…ô, sakakaaj nu wawa ni a-r~…ĺi…ô-k…ô-si…ô. mi-ńßa-ji-r~…ĺuo-wi- ¶i.r~…ĺuo-man-nuo-ńßu atu na-ta-r~…ĺi. ¶i-r~…ĺi-…ô-r~…ĺuo-ńßu-na. na-r~…ĺi…ô-s…ô- ¶in-na, a-r~…ĺi…ô-k…ô-si…ô. mi-ńßa-ji-r~…ĺuo-wi- ¶i.r~…ĺuo-man-nuo-ńßu saka…ôn…ôm nu wawaan tu tatami. . sakaj bina ¶adan a dadan **** ¶ajn…ôm war~…ĺtu mińß ¶aan, ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di a pad…ôk nu wina a kaka ¶i aw-duo-…ô sans…ô mapataj, nai Ē~ ° ku ir~…ĺu ¶ nida. pi-d…ô-ta-di Ē~ ° a duma nu pad…ôk a wina nu kakaan ¶i ji-fan ws…ô ami ¶a ku nika idaw a mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, nika ¶i ji-fan ws…ô r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku udip nida, sisa ¶i puo-ja-…ô-tu-ma pisinkiwan ¶a ¶aj a bataan ku mińß ¶aan ni pi-d…ô-ta-di Ē~ °. tawja nu mińß ¶aan s…ôpadaj a bur~…ĺad, nida a pad…ôk nu kakanaan ¶i suo-fi…ô-ja.a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô- ¶…ôi-ńßu-na. r~…ĺuo-man-nuo-wa mibaŇčbaŇč tu mikuwaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, tatusaaj nida a baki ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺi-…ô atu ji-fun.na-r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô- ¶in i nuajawan nida a mipataj. *****, . nikar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan satu, ¶i ji-fan ws…ô atu ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč mar~…ĺasa-ńßun, ¶i ji-fan ws…ô ku sakakaaj, ¶i suo-f…ôi-ja mar~…ĺas…ô- ¶…ôn, tat…ôŇčan ¶inida ku mikuwanaj. kapur~…ĺuŇčan tu sananar~…ĺ masasakamu , ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di atu ¶i ji-fan ws…ô mapur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôn…ôŇč i nuajawan, ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di Ē~ ° atu bina ¶adan masasakamu, ¶i suo-f…ôi-ja i nikudan mu…ôn…ôŇč. wan mu…ôn…ôŇč i pi-d…ô-ta-di Ē~ ° t…ôpar~…ĺan a nikudan tu mabuńßataj nu panan, sipakajda i pananan, ¶i suo-f…ôi-ja tan…ôŇč mitudu Ē~ ° ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-dian tu kawawan. . ¶ajn…ôm war~…ĺsiw mińß ¶aan, mad…ôm…ô ¶ ni kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di mir~…ĺiŇčatu mib…ôr~…ĺin ¶i suo-fi…ô-ja.a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô- ¶…ôi-ńßu-na. r~…ĺuo-man-nuo-wa a nipikuwan. ¶i suo-fi…ô-ja kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu misimawaj a miwawi…ôs, nika ¶i ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di sar~…ĺabisa mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajdan ¶i si…ô-…ô-kaj-san-sanji siwtawj…ôn, itida tu par~…ĺ ¶apu tu patid…ôŇčan ¶i nidaan. sadikudaj mab…ôr~…ĺin ¶i suo-fi…ô-ja pur~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßantu i siwtawj…ôn. *****, ¶ajn…ôm siwsip mińß ¶aan , ¶ina ni pi-d…ô-ta-di ¶i na-ta-r~…ĺi. ¶i-r~…ĺi-…ô-r~…ĺuo-ńßu-na. na-r~…ĺi…ô-s…ô- ¶in-na im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mapataj, kja tat…ôŇčaaj tu nida sisikin…ôŇč tina kawawan. ¶ajn…ôm siwr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di maŇčar~…ĺaj mijukiw tu ńß…ôi-ńßaj a sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nu bajuan pasajda i k…ô-r~…ĺi-mi-ja-ńßan-kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw. . nida a r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd mutikua ¶a tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° **** ¶ajn…ôm siwn…ôm mińß ¶aan, ¶i sa-ńßun-ji ws…ô i…ômr~…ĺaŇč mapataj, ¶i pi-d…ô sadikudaj mar~…ĺa nidatu a sa-ńßun. ¶ajn…ôm siwpi ¶ mińß ¶aan, maŇčr~…ĺaj miwawi…ôs tu k…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺi-mi-ja kanatar~…ĺ a sakakaaj ¶i …ô Ē~ °-tu-man-tikuo, pa ¶…ôbaan nida ku ŇčaŇčan ta ¶uwa ¶uwa i si-o midan, papatańß…ôkar~…ĺ…ôn nida ku tabakija a masakaputaj, maŇčar~…ĺaj papa ¶uwańß ¶i nidaan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ta- ¶u-s…ô. nika nu o- ¶uo tabakiaj nu kanatar~…ĺan itida namin ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni i si-pan-ja a nikaar~…ĺasiasaj nu nikaar~…ĺawan tu wanwi, u aw-ti-r~…ĺi a ńßidan tu ku nikar~…ĺpa ¶awan kaisa misanai Ē~ ° tu …ô Ē~ °-tu-man a nikasasuŇčaaj. ami ¶a ku ¶aaj kanikar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan tu …ô Ē~ °-tu-man, nika itida i ńß…ô-r~…ĺan ¶inida jadańßtu ku nipinanam nida tu sapisaŇča tu bar~…ĺuŇčan, maadińß nida ku nikar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanatar~…ĺan, namakajni sisa u sasumadan a papar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô. *****, . ¶ajn…ôm siwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, mib…ôr~…ĺin ku r~…ĺabuaj a ńßitaj, maŇčar~…ĺaj paajaw tu pad…ôk a kakaan ¶i suo-fi…ô-ja.a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô- ¶…ôi-ńßu-na. r~…ĺuo-man-nuo-wa par~…ĺasańßuŇčan, ¶i pi-d…ô jis…ô putun ńßan nida ku nipidaŇč kar~…ĺańß…ôn nida tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nika ka tar~…ĺumaan nida idadan ńß…ônaj masasuŇčaaj tu ku nuńß…ôni, ¶i suo-fi…ô-ja.a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô- ¶…ôi-ńßu-na. r~…ĺuo-man-nuo-wa pa ¶i ¶i…ôn patajda i siwj…ôn mar~…ĺabunsan. r~…ĺar~…ĺaba…ôn ni pi-d…ô jis…ô ku mińßantajaj a tad…ômaw, mińßantajaj a tad…ômaw m…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôn ku nipipataj, taŇčańß sipańß…ôr~…ĺak i katuudaj, bur~…ĺasak…ôn ku ńßitaj. tawja a mińß ¶aan, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn ni pi-d…ô jis…ô ku ńßun-ńßuo ¶i j…ôi-ńßu-duo- ¶i-ja. r~…ĺuo-pu-si-na mar~…ĺabunsan. *******, . duma** ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di manamuńß mir~…ĺadaj tu ńßitaj mar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, sajawaj nida a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan maka ¶i, namir~…ĺadajtu tu ńßitaj manamuńß tu nikatar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mańßida u sakakaaj nu ńßitaj. ńßina s…ôn…ôŇč ¶i nida tu sakakaaj a wajwajan nida, kajgun sakakaaj ¶aaj kaw sa-ńßun dada Ē~ °. . maŇčar~…ĺaj misaańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu baju a ¶inr~…ĺian, d…ôm…ô ¶…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku satin…ôŇčaj a ńßitajan u zua-din, ¶inida tu ku mikantukaj tu nipisikian nu ajdaaj a s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw. . ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di namisańßu ¶u nu tad…ômawan katukuńß i ńß…ô-r~…ĺan minanam misaŇča tu bar~…ĺuŇča a nar~…ĺimaan. ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di idaw ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj nida a wajwajan. ku siŇčar~…ĺińß tu tatamaan a wawa ¶i a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-sj…ô. pi-d…ô-r~…ĺuo-wi- ¶i midajdaj tu kawaw nida, mir~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ¶i nidaan ńßinar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw a tad…ômaw, nika ¶i a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-sj…ô. pi-d…ô-r~…ĺuo-wi- ¶i kaisa u ńßu ¶u nu tad…ômaw kuńßan, sa tajda i aw-ti-r~…ĺi mi ¶udad, maŇčar~…ĺaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw tu …ô Ē~ °-kuo, pa ¶…ôbaan sisa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu, ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di pasa ¶a ¶aj…ôn nida ku wawa, u ¶an ¶anan a wajwajan ku sapipataj tu ¶abaj nu wawa nida, u sapakadat…ôŇč patar~…ĺaw tu wawa nida. nika ¶i a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-sj…ô. pi-d…ô-r~…ĺuo-wi- ¶i i katuudaj nu tad…ômawan mińßapu tu sakar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu …ô Ē~ °-kuo tu sapikuwan a sasakamu…ôn. matawid ¶i pi-d…ô-ta-di maŇčar~…ĺaj mibakin ¶i nidaan. nika nakamuan nida anutar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ku wawa nida amar~…ĺańßu ¶unu tad…ômaw sa, ańßi ¶an tu kija ńßaw patajda ńßantu nida i ¶u ¶iw, jińßua, sakakaaj atu duma nu masakaputaj misajbaŇč, ńßinisa ku nuńß…ôni u kawaw nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° namu kujni ńßan. . ¶ajpi ¶ ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm bur~…ĺad tun…ôm d…ômiad, pińßapuan tu nikuda a tusa nu d…ômiadan mar~…ĺawa ¶u tu ¶i a-r~…ĺ…ôi-k…ô-sj…ô. pi-d…ô-r~…ĺuo-wi- ¶i nikatur~…ĺinan a mutiik, pataj satu i s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw a pi-d…ô-paw-r~…ĺuo a kitidaan, tawja nu mińß ¶aan tuwar~…ĺ ku mińß ¶aan nida. **********, .
S.FORM: == Pi-de-ta-di'ŚĹľŚĺóŚ§ßŚłĚ == Pi-de yese, sakakaay nu wawa ni A-lie-ke-sie. Mi-ha-yi-luo-wi-ci.Luo-man-nuo-hu atu Na-ta-li. Ci-li-e-luo-hu-na. Na-lie-se-cin-na, A-lie-ke-sie. Mi-ha-yi-luo-wi-ci.Luo-man-nuo-hu sakaenem nu wawaan tu tatami. . sakay binacadan a dadan Ť¶™śĒŅšĻčŤ∑Į caynem waltu mihcaan, ci Pi-de-ta-di a padek nu wina a kaka ci Aw-duo-e sanse mapatay, nai' ku iluc nida. Pi-de-ta-di' a duma nu padek a wina nu kakaan ci Yi-fan wse amica ku nika idaw a milaylay, nika ci Yi-fan wse la'cus ku udip nida, sisa ci Puo-ya-e-tu-ma pisinkiwan cacay a bataan ku mihcaan ni Pi-de-ta-di'. tawya nu mihcaan sepaday a bulad, nida a padek nu kakanaan ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa mibangbang tu mikuwangay a tademaw, tatusaay nida a baki ci Ci-li-e atu Yi-fun.Na-lei-se-cin i nuayawan nida a mipatay. 1682ŚĻī, . nikalawlawan satu, ci Yi-fan wse atu ci Pi-de-ta-di' mapulung malasa-hun, ci Yi-fan wse ku sakakaay, ci Suo-fei-ya malase-cen, tatengan cinida ku mikuwanay. kapulungan tu sananal masasakamu , ci Pi-de-ta-di atu ci Yi-fan wse mapulung mueneng i nuayawan, ci Pi-de-ta-di' atu binacadan masasakamu, ci Suo-fei-ya i nikudan mueneng. wan mueneng i Pi-de-ta-di' tepalan a nikudan tu mabuhatay nu panan, sipakayda i pananan, ci Suo-fei-ya taneng mitudu' ci Pi-de-ta-dian tu kawawan. . caynem walsiw mihcaan, mademec ni kalepacawan, ci Pi-de-ta-di milingatu mibelin ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa a nipikuwan. ci Suo-fie-ya kinacacay aca milawlaw tu misimaway a miwawies, nika ci ci Pi-de-ta-di salabisa milaliw taydan ci Sie-e-kay-san-sanyi siwtawyen, itida tu palcapu tu patidengan ci nidaan. sadikuday mabelin ci Suo-fie-ya pulul hantu i siwtawyen. 1689ŚĻī, caynem siwsip mihcaan , cina ni Pi-de-ta-di ci Na-ta-li. Ci-li-e-luo-hu-na. Na-lie-se-cin-na imelang mapatay, kya tatengaay tu nida sisikineng tina kawawan. caynem siwlim mihcaan, ci Pi-de-ta-di mangalay miyukiw tu Hei-hay a sakatahekal nu bayuan pasayda i Ke-li-mi-ya-han-kanatal milepacaw. . nida a lemed mutikuaca taluma' Ś§©ŚĎĹśĒłś≠ł caynem siwnem mihcaan, ci Sa-hun-yi wse iemlang mapatay, ci Pi-de sadikuday mala nidatu a Sa-hun. caynem siwpic mihcaan, manglay miwawies tu Ke'-li-mi-ya kanatal a sakakaay ci E'-tu-man-tikuo, pacebaan nida ku ngangan tacuwacuwa i Si-o midan, papatahekalen nida ku tabakiya a masakaputay, mangalay papacuwah ci nidaan, pangangan han tu Ta-cu-se. nika nu O-cuo tabakiay nu kanatalan itida namin ku balucu' nuheni i Si-pan-ya a nikaalasiasay nu nikaalawan tu wanwi, u Aw-ti-li a hidan tu ku nikalpacawan kaisa misanai' tu E'-tu-man a nikasasungaay. amica ku caay kanikalecabayan tu E'-tu-man, nika itida i He-lan cinida yadahtu ku nipinanam nida tu sapisanga tu balungan, maadih nida ku nikalekal nu kanatalan, namakayni sisa u sasumadan a papalekalan tu E'-luo-se. 1697ŚĻī, . caynem siwwal mihcaan tu lalud, mibelin ku labuay a hitay, mangalay paayaw tu padek a kakaan ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa palasahungan, ci Pi-de yise putun han nida ku nipidang kalahen nida taluma', nika ka talumaan nida idadan henay masasungaay tu ku nuheni, ci Suo-fie-ya.A-lei-ke-cei-hu-na. Luo-man-nuo-wa pacicien patayda i siwyen malabunsan. lalabaen ni Pi-de yise ku mihantayay a tademaw, mihantayay a tademaw melecen ku nipipatay, tangah sipahelak i katuuday, bulasaken ku hitay. tawya a mihcaan, pacicien ni Pi-de yise ku hun-huo ci Yei-hu-duo-ci-ya. Luo-pu-si-na malabunsan. 1698ŚĻīŚ§ŹŚ§©, . dumaŚÖ∂šĽĖ ci Pi-de-ta-di manamuh miladay tu hitay malepacaw, sayaway nida a nikalepacawan makaci, namiladaytu tu hitay manamuh tu nikataluma', mahida u sakakaay nu hitay. hina seneng ci nida tu sakakaay a waywayan nida, kaygun sakakaay caay kaw Sa-hun dada'. . mangalay misaahebal tu bayu a cinlian, demecen nu heni ku satinengay a hitayan u Zua-din, cinida tu ku mikantukay tu nipisikian nu aydaay a Sen-pi-de-paw. . ci Pi-de-ta-di namisahucu nu tademawan katukuh i He-lan minanam misanga tu balunga a nalimaan. ci Pi-de-ta-di idaw ku la'cusay nida a waywayan. ku singalih tu tatamaan a wawa ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci midayday tu kawaw nida, milecad ci nidaan hinalepacaw a tademaw, nika ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci kaisa u hucu nu tademaw kuhan, sa tayda i Aw-ti-li micudad, mangalay milaliw tu E'-kuo, pacebaan sisa taluma' satu, ci Pi-de-ta-di pasacacayen nida ku wawa, u cancanan a waywayan ku sapipatay tu cabay nu wawa nida, u sapakadateng patalaw tu wawa nida. nika ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci i katuuday nu tademawan mihapu tu sakala'cus tu E'-kuo tu sapikuwan a sasakamuen. matawid ci Pi-de-ta-di mangalay mibakin ci nidaan. nika nakamuan nida anutaluma' ku wawa nida amalahucunu tademaw sa, ahican tu kiya haw patayda hantu nida i cuciw, yihua, sakakaay atu duma nu masakaputay misaybang, hinisa ku nuheni u kawaw nu luma' namu kuyni han. . caypic caywal mihcaan enem bulad tunem demiad, pihapuan tu nikuda a tusa nu demiadan malawacu tu ci A-lei-ke-sye. Pi-de-luo-wi-ci nikatulinan a mutiik, patay satu i Sen-pi-de-paw a Pi-de-paw-luo a kitidaan, tawya nu mihcaan tuwal ku mihcaan nida. 1718ŚĻī6śúą26śó•, .
